# specify.prompt.md
You are an AI product engineer. Convert the provided product spec into an actionable, testable specification for the NutriPilot app.
- Clarify ambiguities.
- List user stories and acceptance criteria.
- Call out non-functional requirements (performance, security, cost).
- Note AWS Amplify architecture touchpoints (Cognito, API Gateway, Lambda, DynamoDB).
- Output sections: Overview, Assumptions, Open Questions, User Stories, Data Model, APIs, Risks, Out of Scope.
